title: First Customer Finder report
description: JSON contract for the analysis file consumed by scripts/generate_report.py. Derived from references/report-artifact.md and references/research-framework.md.

title.description: Report title shown in the hero.

product_url.description: Public URL of the product or landing page.

search_scope.description: Time, language, and source scope used for research.

verdict.description: One-sentence read on whether reachable early-customer signals exist.

prospects.description: Qualified prospects. Normal mode: up to ten. Every primary prospect must include a valid public source URL and a score from 0 to 100.

patterns.description: Repeated pain or trigger patterns observed across prospects.

limits.description: Caveats shown in the responsible-use section.

name.description: Displayed company, project, or public professional name.

type.description: Prospect category, e.g. Company, Person, Project.

stage.description: Qualification stage from the research framework.

score.description: Composite fit score from 0 to 100, computed from the five weighted dimensions.

pain_signal.description: Concise public pain, demand, or timing signal.

why_fit.description: Why the product fits the evidenced job.

why_now.description: Why this is relevant now, including freshness and any current trigger.

source_url.description: Public URL of the original source.

source_type.description: Source category, e.g. Public forum, Review, GitHub issue, Company page.

signal_date.description: Visible publication date of the signal (YYYY-MM-DD).

suggested_channel.description: Natural, relevant public or professional contact path.

opener.description: Source-based outreach opener, under 90 words by default.

caution.description: What must be confirmed before outreach.

dimensions.description: Per-dimension scores from 0 to 5. Composite score = pain/5*25 + fit/5*25 + timing/5*20 + reachability/5*15 + evidence/5*15.
